game_overlays.matchupNote: The Hurricanes roll into the Bell Centre looking to put a stranglehold on the ECF, but a desperate Canadiens squad faces a must-win scenario to keep their Stanley Cup aspirations alive. With the series momentum hanging in the balance, tonight’s clash is a high-stakes gut check for a Montreal team fighting to avoid a daunting 3-0 hole.
